Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: B. PAREDES; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by ROBERT MAULR.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Derrick Yearby is present.
Attorney MATTHEW PHILIP PEACOCK appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ELAN LAMBERT, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEBRUARY 3, 2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
